html:
This page is about the food item, for other uses see: Meats.

Meat is a Food item dropped by numerous fleshy creatures(Pigs, Beefalo, Deerclops etc.) It can be used to make the Ham Bat, or as an ingredient in multiple Crock Pot Dishes. It also can be dried on a Drying Rack for 2 days to make Jerky. Its less-filling alternative is a morsel, which only provides 12.5 hunger.

Meat can be crafted by Wilson if he has the "Transmute Icky I" skill.

Cooked Meat

Cooked Meat is Meat that has been cooked on a Campfire, Fire Pit, or Star. It can also be used in multiple Crock Pot recipes. Mobs that ordinarily drop Meat and die from being set on fire will drop Cooked Meat instead.

Jerky

Jerky is a product of drying raw Meat on the Drying Rack for two game days. Jerky has a low rate of spoilage of 20 days, and restores 25 Hunger, 20 Health, and 15 Sanity. Jerky provides the same amount of Hunger, but more Health and Sanity than its raw or cooked counterparts. Jerky can also be used in a Crock Pot as 1 Meat Food Value.

Due to the fact that Jerky restores Health, Hunger and Sanity at the same time, this item can be useful for recovering from Woodie's Werebeaver transformation. The same effect can be achieved with Small Jerky, albeit, with weaker restorative properties than normal Jerky.

Tips

  • Without Crock Pots, Jerky is the meat food with the highest Sanity restoration. This makes it great for restoring sanity for Wickerbottom, who can't sleep due to her insomnia, and Wigfrid, who can only eat meat-based food.
  • It is best to convert all Meat into Jerky, as Meat in a Salt Box will last up to 24 days (12 Days on an Ice Box), whereas Jerky on an Ice Box lasts for 40 Days.

Trivia

  • Jerky was added in A Little Rain Must Fall update.

Gallery

  • Original HD Meat icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve
  • Original HD Cooked Meat icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Meats as seen in the poster for A Little Rain Must Fall update.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thịt là một Thực phẩm rơi ra từ nhiều sinh vật có thịt (Lợn, Bò Lai, Deerclops, v.v.). Nó có thể được sử dụng để làm Thịt Dăm hoặc làm nguyên liệu trong nhiều Món Nồi Hầm. Nó cũng có thể được phơi khô trên Giá Phơi trong 2 ngày để làm Thịt Khô. Giải pháp thay thế ít no hơn của nó là một miếng nhỏ, chỉ cung cấp 12,5 cơn đói.

Jerky provides the same amount of Hunger, but more Health and Sanity than its raw or cooked counterparts. Jerky can also be used in a [[Crock Pot]] as 1 Meat [[Food Value]].

Due to the fact that Jerky restores Health, Hunger and Sanity at the same time, this item can be useful for recovering from [[Woodie|Woodie's]] Werebeaver transformation. The same effect can be achieved with [[Small Jerky]], albeit, with weaker restorative properties than normal Jerky.

=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips==
* Without Crock Pots, Jerky is the meat food with the highest Sanity restoration. This makes it great for restoring sanity for [[Wickerbottom]], who can't sleep due to her insomnia, and [[Wigfrid]], who can only eat meat-based food.
*It is best to convert all Meat into Jerky, as Meat in a [[Salt Box]] will last up to 24 days (12 Days on an [[Ice Box]]), whereas Jerky on an Ice Box lasts for 40 Days.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
*Jerky was added in ''[[Version History#A Little Rain Must Fall|A Little Rain Must Fall]]'' update.
